# Media Router

Index of visual media skills.

| Skill | Use when |
|---|---|
| `screen-recording` | Create annotated animated GIF demos or screen recordings. |
| `image-annotations` | Annotate screenshots or diagrams with callouts, arrows, labels, highlights. |
